meta.purpose: Canonical brand-identity reference for agents, partners, and internal teams working with CURA.

company.tagline: AI Automation Consultancy For SMEs & Growing Businesses
company.description: CURA is an AI automation consultancy that helps small and medium-sized enterprises eliminate administrative burden through intelligent automation. We combine strategic consulting with a proprietary Command Centre platform to deliver measurable ROI — saving teams hours every day and turning operational data into growth insights.

positioning.valueProposition: Results-focused AI automation that delivers proven ROI — up to 6 hours saved per day — with a done-for-you implementation approach.
differentiators: Consultancy-led, not just software — we implement for you
Full Command Centre platform for visibility across sales, ops, and finance
Before & after transparency so clients see exactly what changes
Data protection and security as a core commitment

consultancy.name: AI Automation Services
consultancy.subtitle: Done Right
consultancy.description: Strategic AI automation consulting with hands-on implementation for SMEs.

commandCentre.name: Command Centre
commandCentre.description: CURA's proprietary platform giving businesses a unified dashboard across sales pipeline, revenue, team performance, operations, and financial insights.
modules: Team & Ops (team management, sales team, technical team)

aiDiscoverySession.name: AI Discovery Session
aiDiscoverySession.description: A complimentary discovery session to identify automation opportunities within a business.

logo.description: A 3D metallic blue 'CA' monogram. The letters are intertwined in a sleek, swooping form — the 'C' wraps around and flows into an upward-pointing 'A' that suggests forward momentum and ascent. The mark has a polished, reflective finish with gradient blues ranging from deep navy to bright cyan, with a subtle light flare at the apex of the 'A'. The overall effect is dynamic, modern, and premium.
logo.wordmarkStyle: Uppercase, bold sans-serif with a blue gradient fill matching the icon. Letters are tightly tracked with a clean, solid presence.

usage.primaryLockup: Icon stacked above wordmark, centered vertically
usage.iconOnly: CA monogram used as favicon and avatar
usage.clearSpace: Minimum clear space equal to the height of the icon on all sides
usage.backgrounds: Designed for dark backgrounds; a light variant should be produced for light contexts

background.role: Primary page and app background — near-black with a cool blue undertone

surface.role: Card and panel backgrounds — slightly elevated from the base

border.role: Subtle borders and dividers between sections

borderLight.role: Slightly more visible borders for interactive elements

primary.role: Headings and primary body copy — high contrast on dark backgrounds

muted.role: Placeholder text, disabled states, tertiary labels

primary.role: Primary interactive blue — buttons, links, selected states, pipeline bars

primaryHover.role: Hover / active state for primary blue

teal.role: Secondary accent — used for highlights, feature callouts, and decorative emphasis on the marketing site ('Done Right', 'Proven ROI')

cyan.role: Accent for charts, data visualization, and metric callouts

success.role: Positive status — completed calls, revenue growth, active indicators

warning.role: Caution states, pending items, needs-attention flags

error.role: Errors, overdue items, 'Overdue' badges, alert states, flags

areaFill.role: Transparent fill beneath chart lines (green with low opacity)

pipelineBlue.role: Pipeline funnel bars and progress indicators

gradients.heroGlow: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, rgba(59,130,246,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%)

lightMode.description: Color overrides for light-mode contexts. Accent, semantic, and chart palettes remain identical; only foundation, text, shadow, and gradient tokens change.

background.role: Primary page and app background — light blue-gray

surfaceElevated.role: Elevated containers, modals — white with stronger shadow

border.role: Subtle borders and dividers between sections

borderLight.role: More visible borders for interactive elements

primary.role: Headings and primary body copy — near-black

muted.role: Placeholder text, disabled states, tertiary labels

gradients.heroGlow: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, rgba(59,130,246,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%)

typography.philosophy: Clean, modern, and highly legible. Type does the heavy lifting on dark backgrounds, so weight contrast and spacing are critical.

theming.darkMode: Primary product experience — near-black backgrounds with vivid accents. Used in the Command Centre platform.
theming.lightMode: Used on the marketing site and as an optional platform preference. White card surfaces on a light blue-gray (#F1F5F9) background.
theming.systemFallback: Respect prefers-color-scheme on first visit; default to dark if not set.

navigation.style: Collapsible left sidebar on the platform; top navbar on the marketing site
navigation.selectedState: Highlighted background with accent blue text and left border indicator

dashboardCards.style: Dark surface cards with subtle borders, displaying a single KPI metric prominently with a smaller label beneath. Often include a colored icon or mini chart.
dashboardCards.layout: Responsive grid — typically 4 across on desktop, stacking down on smaller screens

statBadges.style: Small colored badges for status — green for completed, blue for scheduled, red/orange for overdue, with pill-shaped border-radius

tables.style: Dark-themed with alternating subtle row backgrounds, clean column headers in uppercase labels, and inline action badges
tables.headerStyle: Muted text, uppercase, small font with letter-spacing

buttons.primary: Blue gradient background, white text, rounded corners, subtle shadow
buttons.secondary: Transparent with border, light text, rounded corners
buttons.cta: Wider padding, sometimes with an arrow icon, used for key conversion actions

charts.style: Line and area charts with green/cyan data lines on dark backgrounds, minimal grid lines, and a soft glow area fill
charts.funnelBars: Horizontal bars in blue, stacked vertically to represent pipeline stages

searchBar.style: Centered in top nav with a subtle border, placeholder text, and keyboard shortcut hint (⌘K or similar)

personality: Confident but not arrogant — we let results speak
Direct and clear — no jargon for jargon's sake
Warm and approachable — we work with SMEs, not enterprises with infinite budgets
Action-oriented — always pointing toward a next step

tone.marketing: Bold, benefit-led, and empathetic to the pain of admin overload. We name the problem clearly ('Administrative Work is Drowning Your Team') before presenting the solution. Highlights are data-driven — hours saved, ROI percentages.
tone.product: Clean and functional. Labels are short. Metrics are prominent. The UI does the talking — minimal explanatory copy.
tone.support: Helpful, patient, human. We guide rather than lecture.

writingPrinciples: Lead with the outcome, not the feature
Use concrete numbers over vague promises
Keep it scannable — short paragraphs, clear headings
Speak to the business owner, not the developer
keyPhrases: Up to 6 hours saved per day
avoidances: Overly technical AI/ML terminology without context
Passive voice when describing what CURA does
Jargon that alienates non-technical SME owners

security.description: CURA positions data security as a core brand pillar — prominently featured on the marketing site with its own dedicated section, reinforcing trust for SME clients who may be cautious about AI and data handling.
